content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: decide(default_architecture)  
C: team(6) ∧ devops(part_time_generalist) ∧ ddl("4 months") ∧ traffic(modest) ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ split(post_release)  
H: low_ops ∧ fast_ship ⇒ prefer(mod_monolith)  
P: mod_monolith → single_deployable(core+billing) ∧ one_db(PostgreSQL) ∧ simpler_ops ∧ faster_delivery  
R: ! microservices_now ∧ ! preemptive_split  
A: Start with a modular monolith on PostgreSQL; it matches the team size, timeline, and traffic, minimizes operational overhead, and keeps the future billing/core split available after release.
[AUDIT]
Fits the constraints and optimizes for speed with low operational complexity.
